[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001000 1
1 01000110 3
2 00110010 3
3 11001000 3
4 10101000 3
5 11111111 a
6 10001101 4
7 00111011 5

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 10001000 2
23 32 10101000 3 match 4
34 43 10001101 4 match 6
45 54 00001001 2
56 65 00001010 2
67 76 01000110 3 match 1
70 07 00000010 1

02 20 00100000 1
13 31 11001000 3 match 3
24 42 10001000 2
35 53 00111011 5 match 7
46 64 00001100 2
57 75 00000010 1
60 06 00000010 1
71 17 01000000 1

03 30 00110010 3 match 2
14 41 10001000 2
25 52 00101000 2
36 63 01001110 4
47 74 00000100 1
50 05 00110010 3 match 2
61 16 01001000 2
72 27 00000000 a

04 40 00000000 a
15 51 00001000 1 match 0
26 62 00001000 1 match 0
37 73 01000110 3 match 1
[completion]
